_meta.purpose: NYSCR ad-type label -> triage class config table (Step 3). Config, not code constants.
_meta.provisional_note: EVERY label is provisional:true. The label set was verified via 2x live fetch of nyscr.ny.gov, NOT yet dual-model cross-checked. Consuming code MUST check the provisional flag: a provisional label may only produce a confident (high) BIDDABLE/NON_BIDDABLE via an exact rule match; a provisional label with low confidence must fall through to HUMAN_REVIEW (never-green invariant).
_meta.discretionary_note: The five discretionary bands and their dollar thresholds are provisional and NOT dual-verified against SFL 163(6)/OGS guidance; treat the thresholds as descriptive, not authoritative.

labels.label: General
labels.reason: open competitive solicitation available to all responsive bidders

labels.label: Discretionary Purchase — general (up to $50,000)
labels.reason: discretionary competitive band (provisional threshold) — open for quotes

labels.label: Discretionary Purchase — NYS small business (up to $200,000)
labels.reason: discretionary band for NYS small business (provisional threshold) — biddable

labels.label: Discretionary Purchase — certified MWBE (up to $200,000)
labels.reason: discretionary band for NYS-certified MWBE (provisional threshold) — biddable

labels.label: Discretionary Purchase — certified SDVOB (up to $200,000)
labels.reason: discretionary band for NYS-certified SDVOB (provisional threshold) — biddable

labels.label: Discretionary Purchase — recycled/remanufactured (up to $200,000)
labels.reason: discretionary band for recycled/remanufactured commodities (provisional threshold) — biddable

labels.label: Continuous Procurement Solicitation
labels.reason: continuously open solicitation accepting responses on a rolling basis

labels.label: Request for Information
labels.reason: RFI/RFC — information gathering, not a solicitation for award

labels.label: Surplus Property
labels.reason: surplus-property disposal/auction, not a procurement of goods or services

labels.label: Contractor Ads
labels.reason: contractor advertisement, not an agency solicitation

labels.label: Grant / Notice of Funds Availability
